name: Buster Blader, the Dragon Destroyer Swordsman
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>破</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>は</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>壊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－バスター・ブレイダー
name_jp_rom: Ryū Hakai no Kenshi - Basutā Bureidā
desc:
1 "Buster Blader" + 1 Dragon monster
Must be Fusion Summoned. Cannot attack directly. Gains 1000 ATK/DEF for each Dragon monster your opponent controls or is in their GY. Change all Dragon monsters your opponent controls to Defense Position, also Dragon monsters in your opponent's possession cannot activate their effects. If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage.

eff_types: Summoning condition, Continuous, Continuous, Continuous, Continuous
mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
